items.title: A study found OpenAI's ChatGPT Health underestimated the severity of medical emergencies 51.6% of the time and overestimated nonurgent cases 64.8% of the time (Kaan Ozcan/NBC News)
items.title_en: A study found OpenAI's ChatGPT Health underestimated the severity of medical emergencies 51.6% of the time and overestimated nonurgent cases 64.8% of the time (Kaan Ozcan/NBC News)
items.title_zh: 一项研究发现 OpenAI 的 ChatGPT Health 在 51.6% 的情况下低估了医疗紧急情况的严重性，在 64.8% 的情况下高估了非紧急病例（Kaan Ozcan/NBC 新闻）
